reasoning: The prompt does not explicitly list multiple resolution dates, but provides a close date of 2026-02-07. Assuming this close date is the single resolution date being considered. Saint-Girons, France has an average daily mean temperature of approximately 9.3°C - 9.5°C in early November (specifically November 9), and an average daily mean temperature of approximately 7.0C - 7.3°C in early February (specifically February 7). Because temperatures generally decrease from autumn to winter, the expected difference is about -2.3°C (Feb minus Nov). The day-to-day variance in daily average temperatures during these seasons is roughly 16°C^2, meaning the standard deviation of the difference between an early February day's temperature and an early November day's temperature is approximately sqrt(32) ≈ 5.6°C. The standard normal z-score for the February temperature exceeding the November temperature is ~ (+2.3 / 5.6) ≈ 0.41, correlating to about a 34-35% cumulative probability that the daily mean on February 7 will exceed the daily mean on November 9.
